children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: a Availability of funds
children.text: Funds made available under other law for the operations of United States Government agencies carrying out functions under this chapter shall be available for the administrative expenses incurred by such agencies under this chapter.

children.heading: Charges for administrative expenses and official reception and representation expenses
children.label: b Charges for administrative expenses and official reception and representation expenses

children.text: such functions are primarily for the benefit of any foreign country;
such expenses are not directly and fully charged to, and reimbursed from amounts received for, sale of defense services under ; andsection 2761(a) of this title
such expenses are neither salaries of the Armed Forces of the United States nor represent unfunded estimated costs of civilian retirement and other benefits.

children.heading: Limitations on funds used for official reception and representation expenses
children.label: c Limitations on funds used for official reception and representation expenses
children.text: Not more than $86,500 of the funds derived from charges for administrative services pursuant to may be used each fiscal year for official reception and representation expenses.section 2761(e)(1)(A) of this title
